title: pisonia olfersiana var. nitida
intro: Pisonia olfersiana var. nitida, also known as the smooth island ebony, is a species of flowering plant in the family Nyctaginaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pisonia olfersiana var. nitida include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
